hero.title: Wyckoff Trading Agent
hero.tagline: Talk human, it reads the tape
hero.subtitle: Wyckoff Volume-Price Analysis Agent for China A-Shares

items.title: Conversational AI Agent
items.desc: Trigger diagnosis, screening, and reports in plain language. 10 quantitative tools, multi-LLM support (Gemini / Claude / OpenAI).

items.title: Five-Layer Funnel Screener
items.desc: Narrows 4,500+ stocks to ~30 candidates through garbage filter, six channels, sector resonance, micro triggers, and AI verdict.

items.title: Portfolio Diagnosis
items.desc: Batch health check: MA structure, accumulation phase, trigger signals, stop-loss. Outputs EXIT / TRIM / HOLD / PROBE / ATTACK commands.

items.title: AI Three-Camp Reports
items.desc: LLM-generated deep analysis with three verdicts: Logic Bankrupt, Reserve Camp, Springboard.

items.title: Daily Automation
items.desc: 5 GitHub Actions cron pipelines: funnel + AI report + rebalance, pre-market risk, limit-up review, recommendation tracking, cache maintenance.

items.title: Multi-Channel Notifications
items.desc: Feishu, WeCom, DingTalk, Telegram — trade signals delivered in real time.

items.title: Signal Confirmation Pool
items.desc: L4 trigger signals require 1-3 day price confirmation before becoming actionable, reducing false breakout risk.

items.title: Dual Interface: CLI + Web
items.desc: Terminal TUI for power users + Streamlit Web for visualization — same tools, two entry points.

steps.title: Configure
steps.desc: Choose model and set API key

steps.title: Talk
steps.desc: Chat with the Wyckoff master in natural language
